title: The Ark Begins to Move
description: Nami must decide whether to follow Enel for safety or trust Luffy and the crew against impossible odds.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Narrator, Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa. Nami must decide whether to follow Enel for safety or trust Luffy and the crew against impossible odds.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, there's no doubt about it.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you planning on bringing that along?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But whatever... Do as you wish,

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: It can't be...! A flying ship!?

summary: Nami must decide whether to follow Enel for safety or trust Luffy and the crew against impossible odds.
